ksa_text: Knowledge of AI and machine learning-specific model risk considerations, including data drift, concept drift, black-box explainability requirements, model instability, and how traditional model risk frameworks must adapt for non-parametric, ensemble, deep learning, and foundation models.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

onet.top_element_label: Evaluating Information to Determine Compliance with Standards

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.
Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: AI Governance falls outside the primary competency scope of the Data Platform Team Lead. This knowledge KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is AI Governance truly out-of-scope for the Data Platform Team Lead? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list AI Governance as a core or recommended competency for the Data Platform Team Lead. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms AI Governance falls outside the established competency profile for the Data Platform Team Lead. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: AI Governance is outside the competency scope of the Data Platform Team Lead. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
